name: Buttermilk Toaster Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat griddle.
2. Beat eggs with brown sugar until very light, about 2 minutes.
3. Mix dry ingredients and stir gently into the beaten eggs.
4. Add buttermilk and oil. Stir only until mixed; batter will be lumpy.
5. For each pancake, pour 1/4 cup batter onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook until surface is covered with bubbles, turn, and cook other side until light brown.
7. Cool on a rack.
8. Place pancakes in an airtight container with wax paper between layers. Alternatively, wrap singly in foil. Label and store in freezer.
9. To reheat in toaster: Remove from freezer and unwrap the pancakes to be reheated. Set toaster on medium-low setting. Toast pancakes, twice if necessary, until heated through.
Calories per 4-inch pancake: About 90
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
